other_observers: Bill Maynard .; Not original finder , Bill Maynard found this bird the day before.
description: Medium sized sterna tern with relatively long wings and long tail streamers in comparison with body and head. Black cap and gray body offset white cheeks , shortish dull red bill with blackish tip , upper wings uniform gray , underwings uniform whitish with a narrow black on tips of primaries , white secondaries .On one occasion saw the red color of legs but in general very difficult to see the legs at all in flight. My only views were in flight.Behaviors: flying over the lake in a strong wind , dipping down to the surface of the water but never saw it it plunge dive. Wing beats strong and deep.Call: None givenPlumage: adult breeding
photographer: Photographer: John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond
